prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mitsubishi 4A31T (660cc turbocharged inline-3, found in the Mitsubishi Minica Dangan ZZ) with a custom billet crankshaft from Tomei to handle 1.2 bar of boost from a Garrett GT12 turbo, paired with a HKS Super SQV IV blow-off valve and a custom intercooler setup using a GReddy Type-S front-mount core

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential, HKS carbon twin-plate clutch, and a custom driveshaft from Drive Shaft Shop to handle the increased torque from the 4A31T build
Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (Toppo-specific valving), Cusco front strut tower bar, and a custom rear subframe brace from J's Racing to eliminate chassis flex under hard cornering
estetica: Custom Rocket Bunny-inspired widebody kit (Toppo-specific, not a rebadge) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser from Vertex Japan, paired with a custom ducktail spoiler from Auto Produce Boss
Full interior strip with a custom roll cage from Sabelt (Toppo-specific mounting points), Bride Zeta III bucket seats, and a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay from Varis

Exterior lighting upgrade with custom LED headlight projectors from Morimoto (Toppo-specific housing), rear LED taillights from Work Wheels, and a custom underglow kit from Orbit LED (chassis-specific mounting)
